rulings.Case Title: SHARON B. SIEGEL VS. ALLEN JOEL RUBY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Defendants Allen Ruby, Steve Ellenberg And Ruby And Schofield'S Motion For Summary Judgment.
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MARCH O2, 2007, LINE 19. DEFENDANTS ALLEN RUBY, STEVE ELLENBERG, AND RUBY AND SCHOFIELD'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: DEFENDANT'S MOTION UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 170.6 IS DENIED AS UNTIMELY UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 170.6.2 ABD C.C.P. SECTION 437C(H). MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. THE CONTINUING REPRESENTATION TOLLS THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. THERE IS A NEXUS BETWEEN THE GOLDEN GATE ACTION AND THE SETON ACTION (SEE GURKEWITSZ V HABERMAN) PRECLUDING THE GRANTING OF THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT AS TO WHETHER DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT. =(302/PJM/PB)
